metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🔄 Lateral Movement & Internal Reconnaissance
---
Detects internal movement by correlating Windows logon events with Syslog Unix auth activity and firewall internal traffic. Identifies accounts moving between systems, segmentation violations, and reconnaissance patterns."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔀 Accounts Moving Across Multiple Systems"},"name":"movement-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType in (3, 10)
| where isnotempty(TargetUserName) and TargetUserName !has '$'
| summarize
    SystemCount = dcount(Computer),
    Systems = make_set(Computer, 10),
    LogonCount = count(),
    LastLogon = max(TimeGenerated)
    by TargetUserName
| where SystemCount > 3
| sort by SystemCount desc","size":0,"title":"Accounts that logged into more than 3 distinct Windows systems","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"SystemCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}},{"columnMatch":"LastLogon","formatter":6}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"SystemCount","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-multi-system"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType in (3, 10)
| where isnotempty(TargetUserName) and TargetUserName !has '$'
| where isnotempty(IpAddress) and IpAddress != '-' and IpAddress != '127.0.0.1'
| summarize LogonCount = count(), Computers = make_set(Computer, 5) by TargetUserName, IpAddress
| where LogonCount > 5
| sort by LogonCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Network logons by account and source IP","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"LogonCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":100}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-net-logons"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🚧 Internal Segmentation Violations (Firewall)"},"name":"segmentation-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) and isnotempty(DestinationIP)
| where SourceIP startswith '10.' or SourceIP startswith '192.168.' or SourceIP startswith '172.'
| where DestinationIP startswith '10.' or DestinationIP startswith '192.168.' or DestinationIP startswith '172.'
| summarize DenyCount = count() by SourceIP, DestinationIP, DestinationPort
| where DenyCount > 10
| sort by DenyCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Internal-to-internal firewall denies — segmentation violations","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"DenyCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":200}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-segmentation"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| where SourceIP startswith '10.' or SourceIP startswith '192.168.' or SourceIP startswith '172.'
| summarize ScanCount = dcount(DestinationPort) by SourceIP
| where ScanCount > 10
| sort by ScanCount desc
| take 15","size":0,"title":"Internal IPs scanning many ports — port scanner detection","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ScanCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-port-scan"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔎 Reconnaissance Commands on Servers"},"name":"recon-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4688
| where NewProcessName has_any ('net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'nltest.exe', 'whoami.exe', 'ipconfig.exe', 'nbtstat.exe', 'arp.exe', 'route.exe', 'netstat.exe', 'systeminfo.exe', 'tasklist.exe', 'quser.exe', 'ping.exe', 'tracert.exe', 'nslookup.exe')
| summarize ExecCount = count() by SubjectUserName, NewProcessName, Computer
| where ExecCount > 3
| sort by ExecCount desc
| take 30","size":0,"title":"Recon commands executed on Windows servers","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ExecCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-win-recon"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Syslog
| where ProcessName in ('id', 'whoami', 'ifconfig', 'ip', 'netstat', 'ps', 'who', 'w', 'last', 'uname', 'hostname', 'arp', 'route', 'nmap', 'masscan')
| summarize Count = count() by HostName, ProcessName
| where Count > 3
| sort by Count desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Recon process execution on Unix servers","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Count","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-unix-recon"}],"styleSettings":{},"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
